category_sources: source_facts.description says utftex pretty prints math in monospace fonts using TeX-like syntax.
source_facts.homepage points to the official libtexprintf repository for utftex.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository and best available documentation surface for utftex/libtexprintf.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TeX-like math pretty printing in monospace fonts.
source_facts.executables lists utftex and utfstringinfo command-line tools.
